hypothesis: Continual pre-training of a MOF-property predictor that fuses a MOFid-based text encoder with a lightweight 3D MOF geometry encoder, trained with a cross-modal consistency objective, will improve extrapolative adsorption-property predictions for out-of-distribution MOFs (novel SBUs/topologies) beyond text-only MOFid models, reducing MAE on CO2 and CH4 adsorption benchmarks in QMOF/hMOF by at least 12% on a hold-out dataset of MOFs with unseen topologies.
